revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:November 17 (old lunar calendar)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of November 17 (old lunar calendar)]]</includeonly>

'''旧暦11月17日'''は[[旧暦]][[11月 (旧暦)|11月]]の17日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]]である。
== できごと == * [[養老]]元年<!--（[[717年]]_月_日）--> - [[元正天皇]]が行幸して[[養老の滝]]を命名したことに因み養老に改元 * [[承暦]]元年<!--（[[1077年]]_月_日）--> - 承暦に改元 * [[文治]]元年<!--（[[1185年]]_月_日）--> - 吉野山中で[[源義経]]と別れた愛妾・[[静御前]]が[[鎌倉幕府]]方に捕縛される * [[弘安]]8年<!--（[[1285年]]_月_日）--> - 霜月騒動。内管領・平頼綱の讒言により、[[鎌倉幕府]][[執権]]・[[北条貞時]]が外祖父・安達泰盛一族を討つ。執権専政体勢が確立 * [[正保]]2年<!--（[[1645年]]_月_日）--> - 日光東照社に[[日光東照宮|東照宮]]の号が与えられる
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 == * [[慶応]]3年<!--（[[1867年]]_月_日）--> - [[中岡慎太郎]]、[[尊攘派]]志士（* [[1838年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[11月16日 (旧暦)|11月16日]] 翌日[[11月18日 (旧暦)|11月18日]] - 前月[[10月17日 (旧暦)|10月17日]] 翌月[[12月17日 (旧暦)|12月17日]] *新暦[[11月17日]]
{{msg:stub}}

{{旧暦11月}} '''旧暦11月17日'''は[[旧暦]][[11月 (旧暦)|11月]]の17日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]]である。
== できごと == * [[養老]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[717年]][[12月24日]]） - [[元正天皇]]が行幸して[[養老の滝]]を命名したことに因み養老に改元 * [[承暦]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1077年]][[12月5日]]） - 承暦に改元 * [[文治]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1185年]][[12月10日]]） - 吉野山中で[[源義経]]と別れた愛妾・[[静御前]]が[[鎌倉幕府]]方に捕縛される * [[弘安]]8年（ユリウス暦[[1285年]][[12月14日]]） - 霜月騒動。内管領・[[平頼綱]]の讒言により、鎌倉幕府[[執権]]・[[北条貞時]]が外祖父・[[安達泰盛]]一族を討つ。執権専政体勢が確立 * [[正保]]2年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1646年]][[1月3日]]） - 日光東照社に[[日光東照宮|東照宮]]の号が与えられる

== 忌日 == * [[天保]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1836年]][[12月24日]]） - [[飯塚伊賀七]]、[[発明家]]（* [[1762年]]） * [[慶応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1867年]][[12月12日]]） - [[中岡慎太郎]]、[[尊攘派]]志士（* [[1838年]]）

== できごと == * [[養老]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[717年]][[12月24日]]） - [[元正天皇]]が行幸して[[養老の滝]]を命名したことに因み[[霊亀]]より養老に[[改元]]。 * [[承暦]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1077年]][[12月5日]]） - [[承保]]より承暦に改元。 * [[文治]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1185年]][[12月10日]]） - 吉野山中で[[源義経]]と別れた愛妾・[[静御前]]が[[鎌倉幕府]]方に捕縛される。 * [[弘安]]8年（ユリウス暦[[1285年]][[12月14日]]） - [[霜月騒動]]。内管領・[[平頼綱]]の讒言により、鎌倉幕府[[執権]]・[[北条貞時]]が外戚・[[安達泰盛]]一族を族滅。執権専政体勢が確立。 * [[正保]]2年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1646年]][[1月3日]]） - [[日光東照宮|日光東照社]]に[[東照宮]]の号が与えられる。
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 == * [[天保]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1836年]][[12月24日]]） - [[飯塚伊賀七]]、[[発明家]]（* [[1762年]]） * [[慶応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1867年]][[12月12日]]） - [[中岡慎太郎]]、[[尊攘派]]志士（* [[1838年]]）

--> == Events == * [[養老]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[717年]][[12月24日]]） - [[元正天皇]]が行幸して[[養老の滝]]を命名したことに因み[[霊亀]]より養老に[[改元]]。 * [[承暦]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1077年]][[12月5日]]） - [[承保]]より承暦に改元。 * [[文治]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1185年]][[12月10日]]） - 吉野山中で[[源義経]]と別れた愛妾・[[静御前]]が[[鎌倉幕府]]方に捕縛される。 * [[弘安]]8年（ユリウス暦[[1285年]][[12月14日]]） - [[霜月騒動]]。内管領・[[平頼綱]]の讒言により、鎌倉幕府[[執権]]・[[北条貞時]]が外戚・[[安達泰盛]]一族を族滅。執権専政体勢が確立。 * [[正保]]2年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1646年]][[1月3日]]） - [[日光東照宮|日光東照社]]に[[東照宮]]の号が与えられる。
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[天保]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1836年]][[12月24日]]） - [[飯塚伊賀七]]、[[発明家]]（* [[1762年]]） * [[慶応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1867年]][[12月12日]]） - [[中岡慎太郎]]、[[尊攘派]]志士（* [[1838年]]）

[[sn:November 17 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 11월 17일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月17日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 17일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十七]] [[zh:十一月十七]] [[en:draft:November 17 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar November}} '''November 17''' is the 17th day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
== Events == * [[養老]]1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[717]][[12月24日]]） - [[元正天皇]]が行幸して[[養老の滝]]を命名したことに因み[[霊亀]]より養老に[[改元]]。 * [[承暦]]1st year（ユリウス暦[[1077]][[12月5日]]） - [[承保]]より承暦に改元。 * [[文治]]1st year（ユリウス暦[[1185]][[12月10日]]） - 吉野山中で[[源義経]]と別れた愛妾・[[静御前]]が[[鎌倉幕府]]方に捕縛される。 * [[弘安]]8年（ユリウス暦[[1285]][[12月14日]]） - [[霜月騒動]]。内管領・[[平頼綱]]の讒言により、鎌倉幕府[[執権]]・[[北条貞時]]が外戚・[[安達泰盛]]一族を族滅。執権専政体勢が確立。 * [[正保]]2年（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1646]][[1月3日]]） - [[日光東照宮|日光東照社]]に[[東照宮]]の号が与えられる。
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[天保]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1836]][[12月24日]]） - [[飯塚伊賀七]]、[[発明家]]（* [[1762]]） * [[慶応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1867]][[12月12日]]） - [[中岡慎太郎]]、[[尊攘派]]志士（* [[1838]]）

[[sn:November 17 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 11월 17일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月17日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 17일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十七]] [[zh:十一月十七]] [[en:draft:November 17 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar November}} '''November 17''' is the 17th day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
== Events == * [[養老]]1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[717]][[12月24日]]） - [[元正天皇]]が行幸して[[養老の滝]]を命名したことに因み[[霊亀]]より養老に[[改元]]。 * [[承暦]]1st year（ユリウス暦[[1077]][[12月5日]]） - [[承保]]より承暦に改元。 * [[文治]]1st year（ユリウス暦[[1185]][[12月10日]]） - 吉野山中で[[源義経]]と別れた愛妾・[[静御前]]が[[鎌倉幕府]]方に捕縛される。 * [[弘安]]8th year（ユリウス暦[[1285]][[12月14日]]） - [[霜月騒動]]。内管領・[[平頼綱]]の讒言により、鎌倉幕府[[執権]]・[[北条貞時]]が外戚・[[安達泰盛]]一族を族滅。執権専政体勢が確立。 * [[正保]]2年（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1646]][[1月3日]]） - [[日光東照宮|日光東照社]]に[[東照宮]]の号が与えられる。
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[天保]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1836]][[12月24日]]） - [[飯塚伊賀七]]、[[発明家]]（* [[1762]]） * [[慶応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1867]][[12月12日]]） - [[中岡慎太郎]]、[[尊攘派]]志士（* [[1838]]）

[[sn:November 17 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 11월 17일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月17日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 17일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十七]] [[zh:十一月十七]] [[en:draft:November 17 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar November}} '''November 17''' is the 17th day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老}}1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[717]][[12月24日]]） - [[元正天皇]]が行幸して[[養老の滝]]を命名したことに因み{{ill|Reiki|ja|霊亀}}より養老に[[改元]]。 * {{ill|Shōryaku|ja|承暦}}1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1077]][[12月5日]]） - [[承保]]より承暦に改元。 * [[文治]]1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1185]][[12月10日]]） - 吉野山中で[[源義経]]と別れた愛妾・[[静御前]]が[[鎌倉幕府]]方に捕縛される。 * [[弘安]]8th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1285]][[12月14日]]） - [[霜月騒動]]。内管領・[[平頼綱]]の讒言により、鎌倉幕府[[執権]]・[[北条貞時]]が外戚・[[安達泰盛]]一族を族滅。執権専政体勢が確立。 * {{ill|Shōhō|ja|正保}}2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1646]][[1月3日]]） - [[日光東照宮|日光東照社]]に[[東照宮]]の号が与えられる。
== Births ==
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}}7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1836]][[12月24日]]） - [[飯塚伊賀七]]、[[発明家]]（* [[1762]]） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}}3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]][[12月12日]]） - [[中岡慎太郎]]、[[尊攘派]]志士（* [[1838]]）

[[sn:November 17 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 17일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月17日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 17일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十七]] [[zh:十一月十七]] [[en:draft:November 17 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 17''' is the 17th day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[717]] [[12月24日]] ） - [[元正天皇]] が行幸して[[養老の滝]] を命名したことに因み{{ill|Reiki|ja|霊亀}} より養老に[[改元]] 。 * {{ill|Shōryaku|ja|承暦}} 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1077]] [[12月5日]] ） - [[承保]] より承暦に改元。 * [[文治]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1185]] [[12月10日]] ） - 吉野山中で[[源義経]] と別れた愛妾・[[静御前]] が[[鎌倉幕府]] 方に捕縛される。 * [[弘安]] 8th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1285]] [[12月14日]] ） - [[霜月騒動]] 。内管領・[[平頼綱]] の讒言により、鎌倉幕府[[執権]] ・[[北条貞時]] が外戚・[[安達泰盛]] 一族を族滅。執権専政体勢が確立。 * {{ill|Shōhō|ja|正保}} 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1646]] [[1月3日]] ） - [[日光東照宮|日光東照社]] に[[東照宮]] の号が与えられる。
== Births ==
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1836]] [[12月24日]] ） - [[飯塚伊賀七]] 、[[発明家]] （* [[1762]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[12月12日]] ） - [[中岡慎太郎]] 、[[尊攘派]] 志士（* [[1838]] ）
== Commemorations == [[将棋所#御城将棋|御城将棋]] （江戸時代、徳川吉宗の代から江戸幕府の崩壊まで）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|16|11|18|10|17|12|11|1117}}

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[November 17 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] to [[November 17 (Lunisolar)]]: Text replacement - "Old Lunar Calendar" to "Lunisolar"
revision.text:
[[sn:November 17 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 17일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月17日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 17일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十七]] [[zh:十一月十七]] [[en:draft:November 17 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 17''' is the 17th day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[717]] [[December 24]] ） - [[元正天皇]] が行幸して[[養老の滝]] を命名したことに因み{{ill|Reiki|ja|霊亀}} より養老に[[改元]] 。 * {{ill|Shōryaku|ja|承暦}} 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1077]] [[December 5]] ） - [[承保]] より承暦に改元。 * [[文治]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1185]] [[December 10]] ） - 吉野山中で[[源義経]] と別れた愛妾・[[静御前]] が[[鎌倉幕府]] 方に捕縛される。 * [[弘安]] 8th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1285]] [[December 14]] ） - [[霜月騒動]] 。内管領・[[平頼綱]] の讒言により、鎌倉幕府[[執権]] ・[[北条貞時]] が外戚・[[安達泰盛]] 一族を族滅。執権専政体勢が確立。 * {{ill|Shōhō|ja|正保}} 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1646]] [[January 3]] ） - [[日光東照宮|日光東照社]] に[[東照宮]] の号が与えられる。
== Births ==
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1836]] [[December 24]] ） - [[飯塚伊賀七]] 、[[発明家]] （* [[1762]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[December 12]] ） - [[中岡慎太郎]] 、[[尊攘派]] 志士（* [[1838]] ）
== Commemorations == [[将棋所#御城将棋|御城将棋]] （江戸時代、徳川吉宗の代から江戸幕府の崩壊まで）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|16|11|18|10|17|12|11|1117}}

[[sn:November 17 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 17일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月17日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 17일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十七]] [[zh:十一月十七]] [[en:draft:November 17 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 17''' is the 17th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Lunisolar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[717]] [[December 24]] ） - [[元正天皇]] が行幸して[[養老の滝]] を命名したことに因み{{ill|Reiki|ja|霊亀}} より養老に[[改元]] 。 * {{ill|Shōryaku|ja|承暦}} 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1077]] [[December 5]] ） - [[承保]] より承暦に改元。 * [[文治]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1185]] [[December 10]] ） - 吉野山中で[[源義経]] と別れた愛妾・[[静御前]] が[[鎌倉幕府]] 方に捕縛される。 * [[弘安]] 8th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1285]] [[December 14]] ） - [[霜月騒動]] 。内管領・[[平頼綱]] の讒言により、鎌倉幕府[[執権]] ・[[北条貞時]] が外戚・[[安達泰盛]] 一族を族滅。執権専政体勢が確立。 * {{ill|Shōhō|ja|正保}} 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1646]] [[January 3]] ） - [[日光東照宮|日光東照社]] に[[東照宮]] の号が与えられる。
== Births ==
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1836]] [[December 24]] ） - [[飯塚伊賀七]] 、[[発明家]] （* [[1762]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[December 12]] ） - [[中岡慎太郎]] 、[[尊攘派]] 志士（* [[1838]] ）
== Commemorations == [[将棋所#御城将棋|御城将棋]] （江戸時代、徳川吉宗の代から江戸幕府の崩壊まで）

== Events == * {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[717]] [[December 24]] ） - [[元正天皇]] が行幸して[[養老の滝]] を命名したことに因み{{ill|Reiki|ja|霊亀}} より養老に[[改元]] 。 * {{ill|Shōryaku|ja|承暦}} 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1077]] [[December 5]] ） - [[承保]] より承暦に改元。 * [[文治]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1185]] [[December 10]] ） - 吉野山中で[[源義経]] と別れた愛妾・[[静御前]] が[[鎌倉幕府]] 方に捕縛される。 * [[弘安]] 8th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1285]] [[December 14]] ） - [[霜月騒動]] 。内管領・[[平頼綱]] の讒言により、鎌倉幕府[[執権]] ・[[北条貞時]] が外戚・[[安達泰盛]] 一族を族滅。執権専政体勢が確立。 * {{ill|Shōhō|ja|正保}} 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1646]] [[January 3]] ） - [[日光東照宮|日光東照社]] に[[東照宮]] の号が与えられる。
== Births ==
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1836]] [[December 24]] ） - [[飯塚伊賀七]] 、[[発明家]] （* [[1762]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[December 12]] ） - [[中岡慎太郎]] 、[[尊攘派]] 志士（* [[1838]] ）

== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1836]] [[December 24]] ） - [[飯塚伊賀七]] 、[[発明家]] （* [[1762]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[December 12]] ） - [[中岡慎太郎]] 、[[尊攘派]] 志士（* [[1838]] ）

revision.text:
[[sn:November 17 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 17일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月17日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 17일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十七]] [[zh:十一月十七]] [[en:draft:November 17 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 17''' is the 17th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[717]] [[December 24]] ） - [[元正天皇]] が行幸して[[養老の滝]] を命名したことに因み{{ill|Reiki|ja|霊亀}} より養老に[[改元]] 。 * {{ill|Shōryaku|ja|承暦}} 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1077]] [[December 5]] ） - [[承保]] より承暦に改元。 * [[文治]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1185]] [[December 10]] ） - 吉野山中で[[Minamoto no Yoshitsune]] と別れた愛妾・[[静御前]] が[[Kamakura shogunate]] 方に捕縛される。 * [[Kōan (Kamakura period)|Kōan]] 8th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1285]] [[December 14]] ） - [[霜月騒動]] 。内管領・[[平頼綱]] の讒言により、鎌倉幕府[[Shikken]] ・[[北条貞時]] が外戚・[[安達泰盛]] 一族を族滅。Shikken専政体勢が確立。 * {{ill|Shōhō|ja|正保}} 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1646]] [[January 3]] ） - [[日光東照宮|日光東照社]] に[[東照宮]] の号が与えられる。
== Births ==
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1836]] [[December 24]] ） - [[飯塚伊賀七]] 、[[発明家]] （* [[1762]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[December 12]] ） - [[中岡慎太郎]] 、[[Sonnō jōi faction]] 志士（* [[1838]] ）
== Commemorations == [[将棋所#御城将棋|御城将棋]] （江戸時代、Tokugawa Yoshimuneの代からTokugawa shogunateの崩壊まで）== See Also ==

[[sn:November 17 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 17일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月17日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 17일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十七]] [[zh:十一月十七]] [[en:draft:November 17 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 17''' is the 17th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[717]] [[December 24]] ） - [[元正天皇]] が行幸して[[養老の滝]] を命名したことに因み{{ill|Reiki|ja|霊亀}} より養老に[[改元]] 。 * {{ill|Shōryaku|ja|承暦}} 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1077]] [[December 5]] ） - [[承保]] より承暦に改元。 * [[文治]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1185]] [[December 10]] ） - 吉野山中で[[Minamoto no Yoshitsune]] と別れた愛妾・[[静御前]] が[[Kamakura shogunate]] 方に捕縛される。 * [[Kōan (Kamakura period)|Kōan]] 8th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1285]] [[December 14]] ） - [[霜月騒動]] 。内管領・[[平頼綱]] の讒言により、鎌倉幕府[[Shikken]] ・[[北条貞時]] が外戚・[[安達泰盛]] 一族を族滅。Shikken専政体勢が確立。 * {{ill|Shōhō|ja|正保}} 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1646]] [[January 3]] ） - [[日光東照宮|日光東照社]] に[[東照宮]] の号が与えられる。
== Births ==
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1836]] [[December 24]] ） - [[飯塚伊賀七]] 、[[発明家]] （* [[1762]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[December 12]] ） - [[中岡慎太郎]] 、[[Sonnō jōi faction]] 志士（* [[1838]] ）

[[sn:November 17 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 17일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月17日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 17일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十七]] [[zh:十一月十七]] [[en:draft:November 17 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 17''' is the 17th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[717]] [[December 24]] ） - [[元正天皇]] が行幸して[[養老の滝]] を命名したことに因み{{ill|Reiki|ja|霊亀}} より養老に[[改元]] 。 * {{ill|Shōryaku|ja|承暦}} 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1077]] [[December 5]] ） - [[承保]] より承暦に改元。 * [[文治]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1185]] [[December 10]] ） - 吉野山中で[[Minamoto no Yoshitsune]] と別れた愛妾・[[静御前]] が[[Kamakura shogunate]] 方に捕縛される。 * [[Kōan (Kamakura period)|Kōan]] 8th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1285]] [[December 14]] ） - [[霜月騒動]] 。内管領・[[平頼綱]] の讒言により、鎌倉幕府[[Shikken]] ・[[北条貞時]] が外戚・[[安達泰盛]] 一族を族滅。Shikken専政体勢が確立。 * {{ill|Shōhō|ja|正保}} 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1646]] [[January 3]] ） - [[日光東照宮|日光東照社]] に[[東照宮]] の号が与えられる。
== Births ==
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1836]] [[December 24]] ） - [[飯塚伊賀七]] 、[[発明家]] （* [[1762]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[December 12]] ） - [[中岡慎太郎]] 、[[Sonnō jōi faction]] 志士（* [[1838]] ）
== Commemorations == [[将棋所#御城将棋|御城将棋]] （江戸時代、Tokugawa Yoshimuneの代からTokugawa shogunateの崩壊まで）

revision.text:
[[sn:November 17 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 17일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月17日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 17일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十七]] [[zh:十一月十七]] [[en:draft:November 17 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 17''' is the 17th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[717]] [[December 24]] ） - [[元正天皇]] が行幸して[[養老の滝]] を命名したことに因み{{ill|Reiki|ja|霊亀}} より養老に[[改元]] 。 * {{ill|Shōryaku|ja|承暦}} 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1077]] [[December 5]] ） - [[承保]] より承暦に改元。 * [[文治]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1185]] [[December 10]] ） - 吉野山中で[[Minamoto no Yoshitsune]] と別れた愛妾・[[静御前]] が[[Kamakura shogunate]] 方に捕縛される。 * [[Kōan (Kamakura period)|Kōan]] 8th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1285]] [[December 14]] ） - [[霜月騒動]] 。内管領・[[平頼綱]] の讒言により、鎌倉幕府[[Shikken]] ・[[北条貞時]] が外戚・[[安達泰盛]] 一族を族滅。Shikken専政体勢が確立。 * {{ill|Shōhō|ja|正保}} 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1646]] [[January 3]] ） - [[日光東照宮|日光東照社]] に[[東照宮]] の号が与えられる。
== Births ==
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1836]] [[December 24]] ） - [[飯塚伊賀七]] 、[[発明家]] （* [[1762]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[December 12]] ） - [[中岡慎太郎]] 、[[Sonnō jōi faction]] 志士（* [[1838]] ）
== Commemorations == [[将棋所#御城将棋|御城将棋]] （江戸時代、Tokugawa Yoshimuneの代からTokugawa shogunateの崩壊まで）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|16|11|18|10|17|12|11|1117}}

== Events == * {{ill|Yōrō|ja|養老}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[717]] [[December 24]] ） - [[元正天皇]] が行幸して[[養老の滝]] を命名したことに因み{{ill|Reiki|ja|霊亀}} より養老に[[改元]] 。 * {{ill|Shōryaku|ja|承暦}} 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1077]] [[December 5]] ） - [[承保]] より承暦に改元。 * [[文治]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1185]] [[December 10]] ） - 吉野山中で[[Minamoto no Yoshitsune]] と別れた愛妾・[[静御前]] が[[Kamakura shogunate]] 方に捕縛される。 * [[Kōan (Kamakura period)|Kōan]] 8th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1285]] [[December 14]] ） - [[霜月騒動]] 。内管領・[[平頼綱]] の讒言により、鎌倉幕府[[Shikken]] ・[[北条貞時]] が外戚・[[安達泰盛]] 一族を族滅。Shikken専政体勢が確立。 * {{ill|Shōhō|ja|正保}} 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1646]] [[January 3]] ） - [[日光東照宮|日光東照社]] に[[東照宮]] の号が与えられる。
== Births ==
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1836]] [[December 24]] ） - [[飯塚伊賀七]] 、[[発明家]] （* [[1762]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[December 12]] ） - [[中岡慎太郎]] 、[[Sonnō jōi faction]] 志士（* [[1838]] ）

[[cdo:11 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十七]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 17''' is the 17th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November|12=draft}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}}, and the day is designated as {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|12=draft}}.
== Events == * In the 1st year of the Yōrō era ({{ill|Julian calendar}} [[717]] {{ill|December 24|ja|12月24日}}) – Because Emperor Genshō went on a royal progress and named the falls at Yōrō, the era name was changed to Yōrō from Reiki. * In the 1st year of the Shōryaku era ({{ill|Julian calendar}} [[1077]] {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日}}) – The era name was changed from Enpō to Shōryaku. * In the 1st year of the Bunji era ({{ill|Julian calendar}} [[1185]] {{ill|December 10|ja|12月10日}}) – The beloved concubine of Minamoto no Yoshitsune, who had parted ways with him on Mount Yoshino, was captured by forces of the Kamakura shogunate. * In the 8th year of the Kōan era ({{ill|Julian calendar}} [[1285]] {{ill|December 14|ja|12月14日}}) – During the Shimotsuki Incident, due to slander by the internal administrator Hira Yoritada, the regent (Shikken) Hojo Sadatoki exterminated the clan of his external relative Adachi Yasamori, establishing a regime of regency rule. * In the 2nd year of the Shōhō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar}} [[1646]] {{ill|January 3|ja|1月3日}}) – The honorific title "Tōshō" was conferred upon Nikkō Tōshō-sha.
== Births == <!-- None listed -->
== Deaths == * In the 7th year of the Tenpō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar}} [[1836]] {{ill|December 24|ja|12月24日}}) – Iizuka Igana, an inventor (born 1762). * In the 3rd year of the Keiō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar}} [[1867]] {{ill|December 12|ja|12月12日}}) – Nakaoka Shintarō, a proponent of Sonnō jōi (born 1838).
== Commemorations == * Shiro Shogi – A castle shogi tournament held from the time of Tokugawa Yoshimune until the collapse of the Tokugawa shogunate.
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|16|11|18|10|17|12|11|1117}}

revision.text:
[[cdo:11 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十七]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 17''' is the 17th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November|12=draft|12=draft}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|12=draft|12=draft}}.
== Events == * In the 1st year of the Yōrō era ({{ill|Julian calendar}} [[717]] {{ill|December 24|ja|12月24日|12=draft}}) – Because Emperor Genshō went on a royal progress and named the falls at Yōrō, the era name was changed to Yōrō from Reiki. * In the 1st year of the Shōryaku era ({{ill|Julian calendar}} [[1077]] {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日|12=draft}}) – The era name was changed from Enpō to Shōryaku. * In the 1st year of the Bunji era ({{ill|Julian calendar}} [[1185]] {{ill|December 10|ja|12月10日|12=draft}}) – The beloved concubine of Minamoto no Yoshitsune, who had parted ways with him on Mount Yoshino, was captured by forces of the Kamakura shogunate. * In the 8th year of the Kōan era ({{ill|Julian calendar}} [[1285]] {{ill|December 14|ja|12月14日|12=draft}}) – During the Shimotsuki Incident, due to slander by the internal administrator Hira Yoritada, the regent (Shikken) Hojo Sadatoki exterminated the clan of his external relative Adachi Yasamori, establishing a regime of regency rule. * In the 2nd year of the Shōhō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar}} [[1646]] {{ill|January 3|ja|1月3日|12=draft}}) – The honorific title "Tōshō" was conferred upon Nikkō Tōshō-sha.
== Births == <!-- None listed -->
== Deaths == * In the 7th year of the Tenpō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar}} [[1836]] {{ill|December 24|ja|12月24日|12=draft}}) – Iizuka Igana, an inventor (born 1762). * In the 3rd year of the Keiō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar}} [[1867]] {{ill|December 12|ja|12月12日|12=draft}}) – Nakaoka Shintarō, a proponent of Sonnō jōi (born 1838).
== Commemorations == * Shiro Shogi – A castle shogi tournament held from the time of Tokugawa Yoshimune until the collapse of the Tokugawa shogunate.
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|16|11|18|10|17|12|11|1117}}
[[cdo:11 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十七]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十七]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十七]]
== References == {{reflist}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunisolar Months}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar November]] [[Category:Senbu]] [[Category:Days 17 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:Lunisolar]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]] [[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]] }} [[sn:November 17 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 17일]] [[ja:11月17日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:十一月十七]] [[en:draft:November 17 (Lunisolar)]] [[en:11月17日 (旧暦)]] [[sn:ovember 17 (Lunisolar)]]

== Events == * In the 1st year of the Yōrō era ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|zh|儒略曆|fr|Calendrier_julien|es|Calendario_juliano}} [[717]] {{ill|December 24|ja|12月24日|12=draft}}) – Because Emperor Genshō went on a royal progress and named the falls at Yōrō, the era name was changed to Yōrō from Reiki. * In the 1st year of the Shōryaku era ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|zh|儒略曆|fr|Calendrier_julien|es|Calendario_juliano}} [[1077]] {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日|12=draft}}) – The era name was changed from Enpō to Shōryaku. * In the 1st year of the Bunji era ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|zh|儒略曆|fr|Calendrier_julien|es|Calendario_juliano}} [[1185]] {{ill|December 10|ja|12月10日|12=draft}}) – The beloved concubine of Minamoto no Yoshitsune, who had parted ways with him on Mount Yoshino, was captured by forces of the Kamakura shogunate. * In the 8th year of the Kōan era ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|zh|儒略曆|fr|Calendrier_julien|es|Calendario_juliano}} [[1285]] {{ill|December 14|ja|12月14日|12=draft}}) – During the Shimotsuki Incident, due to slander by the internal administrator Hira Yoritada, the regent (Shikken) Hojo Sadatoki exterminated the clan of his external relative Adachi Yasamori, establishing a regime of regency rule. * In the 2nd year of the Shōhō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|zh|公历|fr|Calendrier_grégorien|es|Calendario_gregoriano}} [[1646]] {{ill|January 3|ja|1月3日|12=draft}}) – The honorific title "Tōshō" was conferred upon Nikkō Tōshō-sha.
== Births == <!-- None listed -->
== Deaths == * In the 7th year of the Tenpō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|zh|公历|fr|Calendrier_grégorien|es|Calendario_gregoriano}} [[1836]] {{ill|December 24|ja|12月24日|12=draft}}) – Iizuka Igana, an inventor (born 1762). * In the 3rd year of the Keiō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|zh|公历|fr|Calendrier_grégorien|es|Calendario_gregoriano}} [[1867]] {{ill|December 12|ja|12月12日|12=draft}}) – Nakaoka Shintarō, a proponent of Sonnō jōi (born 1838).
== Commemorations == * Shiro Shogi – A castle shogi tournament held from the time of Tokugawa Yoshimune until the collapse of the Tokugawa shogunate.
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|16|11|18|10|17|12|11|1117}}

revision.text:
{{旧暦11月}} '''旧暦11月17日'''は[[11月 (旧暦)|旧暦11月]]の17日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]]である。
== できごと == * [[養老]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[717年]][[12月24日]]） - [[元正天皇]]が行幸して[[養老の滝]]を命名したことに因み[[霊亀]]より養老に[[改元]]。 * [[承暦]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1077年]][[12月5日]]） - [[承保]]より承暦に改元。 * [[文治]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1185年]][[12月10日]]） - 吉野山中で[[源義経]]と別れた愛妾・[[静御前]]が[[鎌倉幕府]]方に捕縛される。 * [[弘安]]8年（ユリウス暦[[1285年]][[12月14日]]） - [[霜月騒動]]。内管領・[[平頼綱]]の讒言により、鎌倉幕府[[執権]]・[[北条貞時]]が外戚・[[安達泰盛]]一族を族滅。執権専政体勢が確立。 * [[正保]]2年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1646年]][[1月3日]]） - [[日光東照宮|日光東照社]]に[[東照宮]]の号が与えられる。
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 == * [[天保]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1836年]][[12月24日]]） - [[飯塚伊賀七]]、[[発明家]]（* [[1762年]]） * [[慶応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1867年]][[12月12日]]） - [[中岡慎太郎]]、[[尊攘派]]志士（* [[1838年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 == [[将棋所#御城将棋|御城将棋]]（江戸時代、徳川吉宗の代から江戸幕府の崩壊まで）
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|11|16|11|18|10|17|12|11|1117}}

revision.text:
{{Not to be confused with|November 17|qq=November 17}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月十七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 17일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 17''' is the 17th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|qq=}}.
== Events == * In the 1st year of the Yōrō era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[717]] [[:en:December 24|December 24]]) – Because Emperor Genshō went on a royal progress and named the falls at Yōrō, the era name was changed to Yōrō from Reiki. * In the 1st year of the Shōryaku era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[1077]] [[:en:December 5|December 5]]) – The era name was changed from Enpō to Shōryaku. * In the 1st year of the Bunji era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[1185]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – The beloved concubine of Minamoto no Yoshitsune, who had parted ways with him on Mount Yoshino, was captured by forces of the Kamakura shogunate. * In the 8th year of the Kōan era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[1285]] [[:en:December 14|December 14]]) – During the Shimotsuki Incident, due to slander by the internal administrator Hira Yoritada, the regent (Shikken) Hojo Sadatoki exterminated the clan of his external relative Adachi Yasamori, establishing a regime of regency rule. * In the 2nd year of the Shōhō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[1646]] [[:en:January 3|January 3]]) – The honorific title "Tōshō" was conferred upon Nikkō Tōshō-sha.
== Births ==
== Deaths == * In the 7th year of the Tenpō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[1836]] [[:en:December 24|December 24]]) – Iizuka Igana, an inventor (born 1762). * In the 3rd year of the Keiō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[:en:December 12|December 12]]) – Nakaoka Shintarō, a proponent of Sonnō jōi (born 1838).
== Commemorations == * Shiro Shogi – A castle shogi tournament held from the time of Tokugawa Yoshimune until the collapse of the Tokugawa shogunate.
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|16|11|18|10|17|12|11|1117|qq=}}
== References == {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|qq=}}.
== Events == * In the 1st year of the Yōrō era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[717]] [[:en:December 24|December 24]]) – Because Emperor Genshō went on a royal progress and named the falls at Yōrō, the era name was changed to Yōrō from Reiki. * In the 1st year of the Shōryaku era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[1077]] [[:en:December 5|December 5]]) – The era name was changed from Enpō to Shōryaku. * In the 1st year of the Bunji era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[1185]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – The beloved concubine of Minamoto no Yoshitsune, who had parted ways with him on Mount Yoshino, was captured by forces of the Kamakura shogunate. * In the 8th year of the Kōan era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[1285]] [[:en:December 14|December 14]]) – During the Shimotsuki Incident, due to slander by the internal administrator Hira Yoritada, the regent (Shikken) Hojo Sadatoki exterminated the clan of his external relative Adachi Yasamori, establishing a regime of regency rule. * In the 2nd year of the Shōhō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[1646]] [[:en:January 3|January 3]]) – The honorific title "Tōshō" was conferred upon Nikkō Tōshō-sha.
== Births ==
== Deaths == * In the 7th year of the Tenpō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[1836]] [[:en:December 24|December 24]]) – Iizuka Igana, an inventor (born 1762). * In the 3rd year of the Keiō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[:en:December 12|December 12]]) – Nakaoka Shintarō, a proponent of Sonnō jōi (born 1838).
== Commemorations == * Shiro Shogi – A castle shogi tournament held from the time of Tokugawa Yoshimune until the collapse of the Tokugawa shogunate.

{{Not to be confused with|November 17|qq=November 17}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月十七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 17일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 17''' is the 17th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜}}.
== Events == * In the 1st year of the Yōrō era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[717]] [[:en:December 24|December 24]]) – Because Emperor Genshō went on a royal progress and named the falls at Yōrō, the era name was changed to Yōrō from Reiki. * In the 1st year of the Shōryaku era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[1077]] [[:en:December 5|December 5]]) – The era name was changed from Enpō to Shōryaku. * In the 1st year of the Bunji era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[1185]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – The beloved concubine of Minamoto no Yoshitsune, who had parted ways with him on Mount Yoshino, was captured by forces of the Kamakura shogunate. * In the 8th year of the Kōan era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[1285]] [[:en:December 14|December 14]]) – During the Shimotsuki Incident, due to slander by the internal administrator Hira Yoritada, the regent (Shikken) Hojo Sadatoki exterminated the clan of his external relative Adachi Yasamori, establishing a regime of regency rule. * In the 2nd year of the Shōhō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[1646]] [[:en:January 3|January 3]]) – The honorific title "Tōshō" was conferred upon Nikkō Tōshō-sha.
== Births ==
== Deaths == * In the 7th year of the Tenpō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[1836]] [[:en:December 24|December 24]]) – Iizuka Igana, an inventor (born 1762). * In the 3rd year of the Keiō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[:en:December 12|December 12]]) – Nakaoka Shintarō, a proponent of Sonnō jōi (born 1838).
== Commemorations == * Shiro Shogi – A castle shogi tournament held from the time of Tokugawa Yoshimune until the collapse of the Tokugawa shogunate.
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|16|11|18|10|17|12|11|1117|qq=}}
== References == {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

revision.text:
{{Not to be confused with|November 17|qq=November 17}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月十七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 17일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 17''' is the 17th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜}}.
== Events == * In the 1st year of the Yōrō era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[717]] [[:en:December 24|December 24]]) – Because Emperor Genshō went on a royal progress and named the falls at Yōrō, the era name was changed to Yōrō from Reiki. * In the 1st year of the Shōryaku era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1077|1077]] [[:en:December 5|December 5]]) – The era name was changed from Enpō to Shōryaku. * In the 1st year of the Bunji era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1185|1185]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – The beloved concubine of Minamoto no Yoshitsune, who had parted ways with him on Mount Yoshino, was captured by forces of the Kamakura shogunate. * In the 8th year of the Kōan era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1285|1285]] [[:en:December 14|December 14]]) – During the Shimotsuki Incident, due to slander by the internal administrator Hira Yoritada, the regent (Shikken) Hojo Sadatoki exterminated the clan of his external relative Adachi Yasamori, establishing a regime of regency rule. * In the 2nd year of the Shōhō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1646|1646]] [[:en:January 3|January 3]]) – The honorific title "Tōshō" was conferred upon Nikkō Tōshō-sha.
== Births ==
== Deaths == * In the 7th year of the Tenpō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1836|1836]] [[:en:December 24|December 24]]) – Iizuka Igana, an inventor (born 1762). * In the 3rd year of the Keiō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[:en:December 12|December 12]]) – Nakaoka Shintarō, a proponent of Sonnō jōi (born 1838).
== Commemorations == * Shiro Shogi – A castle shogi tournament held from the time of Tokugawa Yoshimune until the collapse of the Tokugawa shogunate.
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|16|11|18|10|17|12|11|1117|qq=}}
== References == {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840334]] Wikidata name: 17th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:36, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 17|qq=November 17}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月十七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 17일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 17''' is the 17th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * In the 1st year of the Yōrō era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:717|717]] [[:en:December 24|December 24]]) – Because Emperor Genshō went on a royal progress and named the falls at Yōrō, the era name was changed to Yōrō from Reiki. * In the 1st year of the Shōryaku era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1077|1077]] [[:en:December 5|December 5]]) – The era name was changed from Enpō to Shōryaku. * In the 1st year of the Bunji era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1185|1185]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – The beloved concubine of Minamoto no Yoshitsune, who had parted ways with him on Mount Yoshino, was captured by forces of the Kamakura shogunate. * In the 8th year of the Kōan era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1285|1285]] [[:en:December 14|December 14]]) – During the Shimotsuki Incident, due to slander by the internal administrator Hira Yoritada, the regent (Shikken) Hojo Sadatoki exterminated the clan of his external relative Adachi Yasamori, establishing a regime of regency rule. * In the 2nd year of the Shōhō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1646|1646]] [[:en:January 3|January 3]]) – The honorific title "Tōshō" was conferred upon Nikkō Tōshō-sha.
== Births ==
== Deaths == * In the 7th year of the Tenpō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1836|1836]] [[:en:December 24|December 24]]) – Iizuka Igana, an inventor (born 1762). * In the 3rd year of the Keiō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:December 12|December 12]]) – Nakaoka Shintarō, a proponent of Sonnō jōi (born 1838).
== Commemorations == * Shiro Shogi – A castle shogi tournament held from the time of Tokugawa Yoshimune until the collapse of the Tokugawa shogunate.

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840334]] Wikidata name: 17th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:36, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 17|qq=November 17}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月十七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 17일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 17''' is the 17th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} is {{ill|Senbu|qid=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * In the 1st year of the Yōrō era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:717|717]] [[:en:December 24|December 24]]) – Because Emperor Genshō went on a royal progress and named the falls at Yōrō, the era name was changed to Yōrō from Reiki. * In the 1st year of the Shōryaku era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1077|1077]] [[:en:December 5|December 5]]) – The era name was changed from Enpō to Shōryaku. * In the 1st year of the Bunji era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1185|1185]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – The beloved concubine of Minamoto no Yoshitsune, who had parted ways with him on Mount Yoshino, was captured by forces of the Kamakura shogunate. * In the 8th year of the Kōan era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1285|1285]] [[:en:December 14|December 14]]) – During the Shimotsuki Incident, due to slander by the internal administrator Hira Yoritada, the regent (Shikken) Hojo Sadatoki exterminated the clan of his external relative Adachi Yasamori, establishing a regime of regency rule. * In the 2nd year of the Shōhō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1646|1646]] [[:en:January 3|January 3]]) – The honorific title "Tōshō" was conferred upon Nikkō Tōshō-sha.
== Births ==
== Deaths == * In the 7th year of the Tenpō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1836|1836]] [[:en:December 24|December 24]]) – Iizuka Igana, an inventor (born 1762). * In the 3rd year of the Keiō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:December 12|December 12]]) – Nakaoka Shintarō, a proponent of Sonnō jōi (born 1838).
== Commemorations == * Shiro Shogi – A castle shogi tournament held from the time of Tokugawa Yoshimune until the collapse of the Tokugawa shogunate.
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|16|11|18|10|17|12|11|1117|qq=}}
== References == {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

{{translated page|ja|11月17日 (旧暦)|version=99350664|comment=Imported full ja history}}

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月十七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 17일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 17''' is the 17th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} is {{ill|Senbu|qid=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * In the 1st year of the Yōrō era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:717|717]] [[:en:December 24|December 24]]) – Because Emperor Genshō went on a royal progress and named the falls at Yōrō, the era name was changed to Yōrō from Reiki. * In the 1st year of the Shōryaku era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1077|1077]] [[:en:December 5|December 5]]) – The era name was changed from Enpō to Shōryaku. * In the 1st year of the Bunji era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1185|1185]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – The beloved concubine of Minamoto no Yoshitsune, who had parted ways with him on Mount Yoshino, was captured by forces of the Kamakura shogunate. * In the 8th year of the Kōan era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1285|1285]] [[:en:December 14|December 14]]) – During the Shimotsuki Incident, due to slander by the internal administrator Hira Yoritada, the regent (Shikken) Hojo Sadatoki exterminated the clan of his external relative Adachi Yasamori, establishing a regime of regency rule. * In the 2nd year of the Shōhō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1646|1646]] [[:en:January 3|January 3]]) – The honorific title "Tōshō" was conferred upon Nikkō Tōshō-sha.
== Births ==
== Deaths == * In the 7th year of the Tenpō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1836|1836]] [[:en:December 24|December 24]]) – Iizuka Igana, an inventor (born 1762). * In the 3rd year of the Keiō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:December 12|December 12]]) – Nakaoka Shintarō, a proponent of Sonnō jōi (born 1838).
== Commemorations == * Shiro Shogi – A castle shogi tournament held from the time of Tokugawa Yoshimune until the collapse of the Tokugawa shogunate.

== Events == * In the 1st year of the Yōrō era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:717|717]] [[:en:December 24|December 24]]) – Because Emperor Genshō went on a royal progress and named the falls at Yōrō, the era name was changed to Yōrō from Reiki. * In the 1st year of the Shōryaku era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1077|1077]] [[:en:December 5|December 5]]) – The era name was changed from Enpō to Shōryaku. * In the 1st year of the Bunji era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1185|1185]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – The beloved concubine of Minamoto no Yoshitsune, who had parted ways with him on Mount Yoshino, was captured by forces of the Kamakura shogunate. * In the 8th year of the Kōan era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1285|1285]] [[:en:December 14|December 14]]) – During the Shimotsuki Incident, due to slander by the internal administrator Hira Yoritada, the regent (Shikken) Hojo Sadatoki exterminated the clan of his external relative Adachi Yasamori, establishing a regime of regency rule. * In the 2nd year of the Shōhō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1646|1646]] [[:en:January 3|January 3]]) – The honorific title "Tōshō" was conferred upon Nikkō Tōshō-sha.
== Births ==
== Deaths == * In the 7th year of the Tenpō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1836|1836]] [[:en:December 24|December 24]]) – Iizuka Igana, an inventor (born 1762). * In the 3rd year of the Keiō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:December 12|December 12]]) – Nakaoka Shintarō, a proponent of Sonnō jōi (born 1838).
== Commemorations == * Shiro Shogi – A castle shogi tournament held from the time of Tokugawa Yoshimune until the collapse of the Tokugawa shogunate.
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|16|11|18|10|17|12|11|1117|qq=}}

== Events == * In the 1st year of the Yōrō era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:717|717]] [[:en:December 24|December 24]]) – Because Emperor Genshō went on a royal progress and named the falls at Yōrō, the era name was changed to Yōrō from Reiki. * In the 1st year of the Shōryaku era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1077|1077]] [[:en:December 5|December 5]]) – The era name was changed from Enpō to Shōryaku. * In the 1st year of the Bunji era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1185|1185]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – The beloved concubine of Minamoto no Yoshitsune, who had parted ways with him on Mount Yoshino, was captured by forces of the Kamakura shogunate. * In the 8th year of the Kōan era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1285|1285]] [[:en:December 14|December 14]]) – During the Shimotsuki Incident, due to slander by the internal administrator Hira Yoritada, the regent (Shikken) Hojo Sadatoki exterminated the clan of his external relative Adachi Yasamori, establishing a regime of regency rule. * In the 2nd year of the Shōhō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1646|1646]] [[:en:January 3|January 3]]) – The honorific title "Tōshō" was conferred upon Nikkō Tōshō-sha.
== Births ==
== Deaths == * In the 7th year of the Tenpō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1836|1836]] [[:en:December 24|December 24]]) – Iizuka Igana, an inventor (born 1762). * In the 3rd year of the Keiō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:December 12|December 12]]) – Nakaoka Shintarō, a proponent of Sonnō jōi (born 1838).
== Commemorations == * Shiro Shogi – A castle shogi tournament held from the time of Tokugawa Yoshimune until the collapse of the Tokugawa shogunate.
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|16|11|18|10|17|12|11|1117|qq=}}

== Events == * In the 1st year of the Yōrō era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:717|717]] [[:en:December 24|December 24]]) – Because Emperor Genshō went on a royal progress and named the falls at Yōrō, the era name was changed to Yōrō from Reiki. * In the 1st year of the Shōryaku era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1077|1077]] [[:en:December 5|December 5]]) – The era name was changed from Enpō to Shōryaku. * In the 1st year of the Bunji era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1185|1185]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – The beloved concubine of Minamoto no Yoshitsune, who had parted ways with him on Mount Yoshino, was captured by forces of the Kamakura shogunate. * In the 8th year of the Kōan era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1285|1285]] [[:en:December 14|December 14]]) – During the Shimotsuki Incident, due to slander by the internal administrator Hira Yoritada, the regent (Shikken) Hojo Sadatoki exterminated the clan of his external relative Adachi Yasamori, establishing a regime of regency rule. * In the 2nd year of the Shōhō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1646|1646]] [[:en:January 3|January 3]]) – The honorific title "Tōshō" was conferred upon Nikkō Tōshō-sha.
== Births ==
== Deaths == * In the 7th year of the Tenpō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1836|1836]] [[:en:December 24|December 24]]) – Iizuka Igana, an inventor (born 1762). * In the 3rd year of the Keiō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:December 12|December 12]]) – Nakaoka Shintarō, a proponent of Sonnō jōi (born 1838).
== Commemorations == * Shiro Shogi – A castle shogi tournament held from the time of Tokugawa Yoshimune until the collapse of the Tokugawa shogunate.
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|16|11|18|10|17|12|11|1117|qq=}}

Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * In the 1st year of the Yōrō era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:717|717]] [[:en:December 24|December 24]]) – Because Emperor Genshō went on a royal progress and named the falls at Yōrō, the era name was changed to Yōrō from Reiki. * In the 1st year of the Shōryaku era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1077|1077]] [[:en:December 5|December 5]]) – The era name was changed from Enpō to Shōryaku. * In the 1st year of the Bunji era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1185|1185]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – The beloved concubine of Minamoto no Yoshitsune, who had parted ways with him on Mount Yoshino, was captured by forces of the Kamakura shogunate. * In the 8th year of the Kōan era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1285|1285]] [[:en:December 14|December 14]]) – During the Shimotsuki Incident, due to slander by the internal administrator Hira Yoritada, the regent (Shikken) Hojo Sadatoki exterminated the clan of his external relative Adachi Yasamori, establishing a regime of regency rule. * In the 2nd year of the Shōhō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1646|1646]] [[:en:January 3|January 3]]) – The honorific title "Tōshō" was conferred upon Nikkō Tōshō-sha.
== Births ==
== Deaths == * In the 7th year of the Tenpō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1836|1836]] [[:en:December 24|December 24]]) – Iizuka Igana, an inventor (born 1762). * In the 3rd year of the Keiō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:December 12|December 12]]) – Nakaoka Shintarō, a proponent of Sonnō jōi (born 1838).
== Commemorations == * Shiro Shogi – A castle shogi tournament held from the time of Tokugawa Yoshimune until the collapse of the Tokugawa shogunate.

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月十七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 17일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 17''' is the 17th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * In the 1st year of the Yōrō era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:717|717]] [[:en:December 24|December 24]]) – Because Emperor Genshō went on a royal progress and named the falls at Yōrō, the era name was changed to Yōrō from Reiki. * In the 1st year of the Shōryaku era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1077|1077]] [[:en:December 5|December 5]]) – The era name was changed from Enpō to Shōryaku. * In the 1st year of the Bunji era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1185|1185]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – The beloved concubine of Minamoto no Yoshitsune, who had parted ways with him on Mount Yoshino, was captured by forces of the Kamakura shogunate. * In the 8th year of the Kōan era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1285|1285]] [[:en:December 14|December 14]]) – During the Shimotsuki Incident, due to slander by the internal administrator Hira Yoritada, the regent (Shikken) Hojo Sadatoki exterminated the clan of his external relative Adachi Yasamori, establishing a regime of regency rule. * In the 2nd year of the Shōhō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1646|1646]] [[:en:January 3|January 3]]) – The honorific title "Tōshō" was conferred upon Nikkō Tōshō-sha.
== Births ==
== Deaths == * In the 7th year of the Tenpō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1836|1836]] [[:en:December 24|December 24]]) – Iizuka Igana, an inventor (born 1762). * In the 3rd year of the Keiō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:December 12|December 12]]) – Nakaoka Shintarō, a proponent of Sonnō jōi (born 1838).
== Commemorations == * Shiro Shogi – A castle shogi tournament held from the time of Tokugawa Yoshimune until the collapse of the Tokugawa shogunate.

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月17日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 17일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月十七]][[zh:十一月十七]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月17日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 17일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月十七]][[zh:十一月十七]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月17日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 17일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月十七]][[zh:十一月十七]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840334]] Wikidata name: 17th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:36, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 17|qq=November 17}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月十七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 17일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 17''' is the 17th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * In the 1st year of the Yōrō era ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|717|en|717|WD=Q23532|lt=717}} {{ill|December 24|en|December 24|WD=Q2705|lt=December 24}}) – Because Emperor Genshō went on a royal progress and named the falls at Yōrō, the era name was changed to Yōrō from Reiki. * In the 1st year of the Shōryaku era ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1077|en|1077|WD=Q19441|lt=1077}} {{ill|December 5|en|December 5|WD=Q2300|lt=December 5}}) – The era name was changed from Enpō to Shōryaku. * In the 1st year of the Bunji era ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1185|en|1185|WD=Q19729|lt=1185}} {{ill|December 10|en|December 10|WD=Q2302|lt=December 10}}) – The beloved concubine of Minamoto no Yoshitsune, who had parted ways with him on Mount Yoshino, was captured by forces of the Kamakura shogunate. * In the 8th year of the Kōan era ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1285|en|1285|WD=Q5546|lt=1285}} {{ill|December 14|en|December 14|WD=Q2382|lt=December 14}}) – During the Shimotsuki Incident, due to slander by the internal administrator Hira Yoritada, the regent (Shikken) Hojo Sadatoki exterminated the clan of his external relative Adachi Yasamori, establishing a regime of regency rule. * In the 2nd year of the Shōhō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1646|en|1646|WD=Q6930|lt=1646}} {{ill|January 3|en|January 3|WD=Q2156|lt=January 3}}) – The honorific title "Tōshō" was conferred upon Nikkō Tōshō-sha.
== Births ==
== Deaths == * In the 7th year of the Tenpō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1836|en|1836|WD=Q7601|lt=1836}} {{ill|December 24|en|December 24|WD=Q2705|lt=December 24}}) – Iizuka Igana, an inventor (born 1762). * In the 3rd year of the Keiō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1867|en|1867|WD=Q7715|lt=1867}} {{ill|December 12|en|December 12|WD=Q2369|lt=December 12}}) – Nakaoka Shintarō, a proponent of Sonnō jōi (born 1838).
== Commemorations == * Shiro Shogi – A castle shogi tournament held from the time of Tokugawa Yoshimune until the collapse of the Tokugawa shogunate.
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|16|11|18|10|17|12|11|1117|qq=}}
== References == {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十七]]
{{translated page|ja|11月17日 (旧暦)|version=99350664|comment=Imported full ja history}}

[[ko:음력 11월 17일]] [[ja:11月17日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:十一月十七]]
[[ar:November 17 (Lunisolar)]]

== Births ==

{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月十七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 17일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 17''' is the 17th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842|1=senpu}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * In the 1st year of the Yōrō era ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|717|en|717|WD=Q23532|lt=717|1=717}} {{ill|December 24|en|December 24|WD=Q2705|lt=December 24|1=December 24}}) – Because Emperor Genshō went on a royal progress and named the falls at Yōrō, the era name was changed to Yōrō from Reiki. * In the 1st year of the Shōryaku era ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1077|en|1077|WD=Q19441|lt=1077|1=1077}} {{ill|December 5|en|December 5|WD=Q2300|lt=December 5|1=December 5}}) – The era name was changed from Enpō to Shōryaku. * In the 1st year of the Bunji era ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1185|en|1185|WD=Q19729|lt=1185|1=1185}} {{ill|December 10|en|December 10|WD=Q2302|lt=December 10|1=December 10}}) – The beloved concubine of Minamoto no Yoshitsune, who had parted ways with him on Mount Yoshino, was captured by forces of the Kamakura shogunate. * In the 8th year of the Kōan era ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1285|en|1285|WD=Q5546|lt=1285|1=1285}} {{ill|December 14|en|December 14|WD=Q2382|lt=December 14|1=December 14}}) – During the Shimotsuki Incident, due to slander by the internal administrator Hira Yoritada, the regent (Shikken) Hojo Sadatoki exterminated the clan of his external relative Adachi Yasamori, establishing a regime of regency rule. * In the 2nd year of the Shōhō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1646|en|1646|WD=Q6930|lt=1646|1=1646}} {{ill|January 3|en|January 3|WD=Q2156|lt=January 3|1=January 3}}) – The honorific title "Tōshō" was conferred upon Nikkō Tōshō-sha.
== Births ==
== Deaths == * In the 7th year of the Tenpō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1836|en|1836|WD=Q7601|lt=1836|1=1836}} {{ill|December 24|en|December 24|WD=Q2705|lt=December 24|1=December 24}}) – Iizuka Igana, an inventor (born 1762). * In the 3rd year of the Keiō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1867|en|1867|WD=Q7715|lt=1867|1=1867}} {{ill|December 12|en|December 12|WD=Q2369|lt=December 12|1=December 12}}) – Nakaoka Shintarō, a proponent of Sonnō jōi (born 1838).
== Commemorations == * Shiro Shogi – A castle shogi tournament held from the time of Tokugawa Yoshimune until the collapse of the Tokugawa shogunate.
